verification.notes: Official page verifies map identity, key landmarks, and major features; detailed vehicle/loot routes still require manual in-game verification.

locations.name: Pochinki

vehicles.name: North Road
vehicles.description: Check both sides of the main road north toward Rozhok.

vehicles.name: West Garage
vehicles.description: Garage spawn on the west edge is useful for fast rotations to Gatka.

vehicles.name: South Junction
vehicles.description: Common road spawn near the junction heading to Ferry Pier.

route: rotate north road or south junction
loot.notes: Strong loot density but long building-to-building fights are common.

locations.description: Popular hot drop with dense compounds and quick third-party fights.

locations.name: School

vehicles.name: Apartment Garages
vehicles.description: Vehicles often appear around the apartment blocks west of School.

vehicles.name: Main Road
vehicles.description: Check the north-south road for cars before rotating to Rozhok.

route: cross to apartments for helmets and meds
loot.notes: Fast loot but low cover while crossing between School and Apartments.

locations.description: Central hot drop with fast close-range fights.

locations.name: Sosnovka Military Base

vehicles.name: East Gate
vehicles.description: Reliable escape route toward the east bridge.

vehicles.name: West Barracks Road
vehicles.description: Check the road line west of the barracks before leaving island.

vehicles.name: South Radar Road
vehicles.description: Useful spawn when rotating late from radar or C-building.

route: take east gate vehicle for bridge timing
loot.notes: Great gear, but bridge control is the main risk.

locations.description: High-value military loot with difficult island rotations.

locations.name: Rozhok

vehicles.name: North Bridge Road
vehicles.description: Check road spawns near the bridge toward Water Town.

vehicles.name: Garage Hill
vehicles.description: Garage-side spawn helps rotate into School or Yasnaya fields.

route: hold north bridge or rotate School
loot.notes: Good central control and flexible rotations.

locations.description: Central town with good rotation options and frequent mid-game traffic.

locations.name: Georgopol

vehicles.name: Container Yard Roads
vehicles.description: Look on both roads beside the crate yard.

vehicles.name: Hospital Road
vehicles.description: Spawn line west of city for safe exits.

route: rotate north city or hospital vehicle
loot.notes: Crates are rich but exposed to long angles.

locations.description: Large loot area split by the river with exposed container fights.

locations.name: Mylta Power

vehicles.name: Main Road East
vehicles.description: Road spawn toward Mylta and Prison rotations.

vehicles.name: Factory Entrance
vehicles.description: Check the entrance line before committing to a long rotate.

loot.notes: Strong squad loot with fewer buildings than Pochinki or Georgopol.

locations.description: Compact high-tier loot area with exposed exits.

secret_rooms.name: Erangel Secret Rooms
locations: South of Zharki, beside the road bend above Georgopol
East of Georgopol, west of Shooting Range, on the hillside line
South of Severny / west of Stalber, near the north-central road
North of Stalber, close to the north coast road
West of Kameshki, on the hill road east of Yasnaya Polyana
South of Hospital, northwest of Gatka
South of Ruins / northwest of Pochinki
Northwest of Primorsk, west of Quarry
North of Ferry Pier, southwest of Pochinki
Northwest of Farm, between School and Farm hills
West of Shelter, south of Mansion road
East of Mylta, south of the Mylta Power road
West Sosnovka Island coast, southwest of the Ferry Pier bridge exit
North of Sosnovka Military Base, central island hills
Southeast Sosnovka Island coast, west of Novorepnoye
secret_rooms.requirements: World-spawned Secret Room Key / Basement Key. Break the wooden ground entrance first, then unlock the metal door with the key.
secret_rooms.loot: High-value secret-room loot. Current official patch notes list items such as All-In-One Repair Kit, Emergency Cover Flare, Emergency Support Flare, and Jammer Pack Lv.3 as possible Secret Room loot sources.
secret_rooms.notes: 15 marker callouts transcribed from community map images and corroborated by the newer Steam guide. Use as practical guidance; exact entrance placement still needs PC live or PUBG Bridge verification.

verification.patch: Steam guide May 2026 plus official Update 26.1
verification.notes: Existence and key requirement are official. Marker callouts are corroborated by Steam guide, which says locations were manually verified in Aug-Sep 2025.
Initial tactical estimate, not yet checked against current live drop behavior.
